---
name: Checklist or control improvement
description: Suggest a new checklist item or improve an existing control
title: "Improve checklist/control: "
labels: [documentation]
---

## Area

Which checklist, control, or governance area should change?

## Problem or risk

What risk, gap, or unclear guidance does this address?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the checklist item or wording change you recommend.

## Likely owner

Who would normally own this control?

- [ ] Engineering / DevOps
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Compliance / Governance
- [ ] Product
- [ ] Legal / Privacy
- [ ] Other: 

## Evidence or validation

What evidence could show this control is in place?

## Confidentiality check

- [ ] This request does not include secrets, credentials, customer data, private prompts, production logs, or confidential source code.
